reports.title: Reports

view.footerNote: All prices are FOB Quito. Please remember that you have 10 days after the date on the invoice to make a claim and that we do not accept credits for freight or handling charges in any case.

toast.successDescription: The new invoice has been saved successfully.

accountStatement.title: Customer Account Statement
accountStatement.description: Select a customer to view their detailed account statement.
accountStatement.selectCustomerDescription: Choose a customer from the list to generate their statement.
accountStatement.pleaseSelectCustomer: Please select a customer to continue.
accountStatement.pdfError: Could not find the content to generate the PDF.
accountStatement.pdfUnexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred while processing the PDF.
accountStatement.noInvoices: No invoices found for the selected period.

sendDialog.title: Send Account Statement
sendDialog.description: The account statement for {customerName} will be sent by email. You can add multiple emails separated by commas.
sendDialog.toRequired: At least one email is required.
sendDialog.toInvalid: Provide a valid, comma-separated list of email addresses.
sendDialog.subject: STATEMENT {customerName}
sendDialog.defaultBody:
Dear Client,
Attached you will find your Statement Update.
Thanks for choosing our product.
sendDialog.pdfGenerationError: Failed to generate the account statement PDF.

view.title: ACCOUNT STATEMENT {customerName}
view.policy1: All claims must be made within 10 days of receiving the flower.
view.policy2: Claims based on freight and cargo handling are not accepted.
view.policy3: Payments must be made to JCW FLOWERS.
view.policy4: All transfers or deposits must be notified by email to jcwf@outlook.es.
view.policyNote: Failure to comply with these policies may result in the suspension of your credit.

farmAccountStatement.title: Farm Account Statement
farmAccountStatement.description: Select a farm to view its detailed account statement.
farmAccountStatement.selectFarmDescription: Choose a farm/supplier from the list to generate their statement.
farmAccountStatement.noInvoices: No invoices found for the selected period.
farmAccountStatement.pleaseSelectFarm: Please select a farm to continue.

sendDialog.title: Send Farm Account Statement
sendDialog.description: The account statement for {farmName} will be sent by email. You can add multiple emails separated by commas.
sendDialog.toRequired: At least one email is required.
sendDialog.toInvalid: Provide a valid, comma-separated list of email addresses.
sendDialog.subject: STATEMENT {farmName}
sendDialog.defaultBody:
Dear Supplier,
Attached you will find your Statement Update.
Thanks for your collaboration.
sendDialog.pdfGenerationError: Failed to generate the account statement PDF.

historicalAccountStatement.selectCustomerDescription: Choose a customer from the list to generate their historical statement.
historicalAccountStatement.noInvoices: No invoices found for the selected customer.

sendDialog.description: The historical account statement for {customerName} will be sent by email.
sendDialog.subject: HISTORICAL STATEMENT {customerName}
sendDialog.defaultBody:
Dear Client,
Attached you will find your Historical Statement Update.
Thanks for choosing our product.

sendInvoiceDialog.title: Send Invoice via Email
sendInvoiceDialog.description: Invoice {invoiceNumber} will be sent to {customerName}. You can add multiple comma-separated emails.
sendInvoiceDialog.subject: Subject
sendInvoiceDialog.bodyPlaceholder: Write a message to add to the email...
sendInvoiceDialog.defaultBody:
Dear {customerName},

Please find your invoice attached.

Thank you for your business.

Best regards,
The JCW Flowers Team
sendInvoiceDialog.successDescriptionGeneric: The email has been sent to {email}.

toast.deleteSuccess: The payment has been deleted successfully. Invoice balances have been recalculated.
toast.deleteSingleSuccess: The individual payment has been deleted successfully.
toast.updateSingleSuccess: The individual payment has been updated successfully.
toast.confirmDeleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the payment group and revert the balance of the affected invoices.
toast.confirmDeleteSingleDescription: This action cannot be undone. The payment of ${amount} from invoice {invoice} will be deleted and the balance will be recalculated.

editDialog.title: Edit Payment Amount
editDialog.description: Modify the payment amount for invoice {invoice}.

receipt.title: Payment Receipt
receipt.description: This is a summary of the payment made by {entityName}.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.description: Manage general settings, permissions, and license information.

generalInfo.title: General Information
generalInfo.description: This system is designed for comprehensive invoicing management in the floriculture industry. It allows creating purchase and sales invoices, managing customers and suppliers, recording payments, and generating detailed account statements for complete financial control.

permissions.title: Permissions & Roles
permissions.description: Manage user roles and access permissions. (Coming soon)

licensing.title: License & Billing
licensing.description: View your license details and manage billing. (Coming soon)

client.title: Register Customer Payment
client.description: Select a customer and the invoices to apply a payment to.

purchase.title: Register Purchase Payment
purchase.description: Select a supplier and the purchase invoices to apply a payment to.
purchase.detailsDescription: Complete the form to register a payment to a supplier.

payments.detailsDescription: Complete the form to register a payment and distribute it among one or more invoices.

toast.successDescription: The payment has been registered and the invoices updated.
toast.successDescriptionPurchase: The purchase payment has been registered and the invoice(s) updated.
toast.errorDescriptionPurchase: Could not register the purchase payment.

form.pendingInvoicesDescription: Select the invoices and enter the amount to pay for each.
form.notesPlaceholder: e.g., Bulk payment for September invoices

dialog.title: Confirm Payment Distribution
dialog.description: The total amount will be applied to the selected invoices as follows. Do you want to continue?
